modal_panel_9slice.notes: Full glass panel — design reference. Runtime fill is canvas gradient.

modal_panel_frame_9slice.notes: Transparent fill. Loaded at runtime as NineSlice border overlay.

chip_9slice.notes: Horizontal-only 9-slice. Runtime alpha driven by tone (on/off/neutral).

button_primary_9slice.notes: PLAY AGAIN style. Fully rounded ends (radius=26).

button_secondary_9slice.notes: HOME / SHARE / CLOSE style. Radius=18, dimmer rim.

divider.notes: Design doc only. Runtime uses Phaser Graphics createDivider().

hud_capsule_9slice.notes: Design reference only. Runtime uses Phaser Graphics createHudCapsuleV3(). Stadium/pill shape (radius=24). Muted rim (0.65 alpha) + outer glow + inner highlight.

exportNotes: Run scripts/build-v3-assets.mjs to export SVGs to raster/.
Ensure RGB=0 where alpha=0 to avoid additive-blend artifacts.
Export at 1x and 2x (HiDPI). WebP preferred, PNG fallback.
